title: There's a difference between "expensive" and "bubble"
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week. After the recent rally, US equities look very expensive. However, looking at a series of other metrics, sentiment, insider behaviour and spillover into other assets, we don't observe irrational exuberance.
